example_sentence: La tesis principal del ensayo es que la educación reduce la desigualdad.
example_translation: The main thesis of the essay is that education reduces inequality.

example_sentence: Su refutación fue convincente y desmontó el argumento contrario.
example_translation: Her rebuttal was convincing and dismantled the opposing argument.

example_sentence: El discurso usó la anáfora para crear un efecto emocional poderoso.
example_translation: The speech used anaphora to create a powerful emotional effect.

example_sentence: La antítesis entre libertad y seguridad domina el debate político.
example_translation: The antithesis between freedom and security dominates the political debate.

example_sentence: Si bien es cierto que el plan tiene costos, los beneficios son mayores.
example_translation: While it is true that the plan has costs, the benefits are greater.

example_sentence: En definitiva, la propuesta no es viable sin mayor financiamiento.
example_translation: Ultimately, the proposal is not viable without greater funding.

example_sentence: Los datos son alentadores; ahora bien, debemos interpretarlos con cautela.
example_translation: The data is encouraging; that said, we must interpret it with caution.

example_sentence: Es incuestionable que el cambio climático representa una amenaza global.
example_translation: It is indisputable that climate change represents a global threat.

example_sentence: Usó la gradación para intensificar el impacto de su argumento final.
example_translation: She used gradation to intensify the impact of her final argument.

example_sentence: Pese a lo anterior, la comisión decidió aprobar el proyecto.
example_translation: Despite the foregoing, the committee decided to approve the project.

example_sentence: Toda decisión importante conlleva cierto nivel de riesgo.
example_translation: Every important decision entails a certain level of risk.

translation: in sum / in short / to sum up
example_sentence: En suma, la evidencia apoya la necesidad de una reforma urgente.
example_translation: In sum, the evidence supports the need for urgent reform.
